overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a narrative game showing an FBI agent exploring the misty town of Bright Falls during the 'Deerfest' celebration. The character walks from the main street down to a flooded waterfront boardwalk, passing rustic wooden buildings and a diner, before approaching a festival float and interacting with workers.

scene_state.functional_zone: small town main street under festival banner

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet main street beneath the large green Deerfest banner

entered.detail: large green banner reading 'Bright Falls 81st Deerfest' spanning across the street
two-story wooden building with large windows and American flag
rustic wooden storefront with covered porch
suspended traffic signals hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty morning in a small Pacific Northwest town, with the camera following an FBI agent walking down the center of a wet asphalt street. A large green 'Deerfest' banner spans overhead between rustic wooden buildings, while traffic lights hang suspended above the empty road.

scene_state.functional_zone: side street leading down to waterfront boardwalk

events.description: turns left off the main street onto a side road heading toward the harbor

agents.ego_description: turning left at the intersection and walking down a narrow street toward the waterfront

entered.detail: blue portable toilets lined up beside the building
white SUV parked near the boardwalk entrance
wooden pier structure extending toward the water

segments.scene_description: The agent turns left down a narrow side street, leaving the main road behind. The camera passes blue portable toilets and a parked white SUV as the wooden boardwalk and misty harbor come into view ahead, with the wooden building now prominent on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk along the harbor with boat views

events.description: steps onto the wooden boardwalk with open views of the harbor and distant buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier overlooking the calm, misty water and distant wharf buildings

entered.detail: calm water of the harbor reflecting the overcast sky
wooden safety railing along the edge of the boardwalk
wooden warehouse structures and boats visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The agent steps onto the wooden boardwalk, transitioning from asphalt to wooden decking. The scene opens up to reveal the misty harbor on the right, with wooden railings, calm water, and distant wharf buildings visible across the water, while the town buildings recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded waterfront street with festival float and diner

events.description: returns to street level from the boardwalk, passing the Oh Deer Diner
turns right toward the Coffee World festival float along the flooded street

agents.ego_description: walking past the Oh Deer Diner and approaching the Coffee World float along the flooded waterfront street

entered.detail: retro-style diner with neon signage and blue facade
festival float with large deer statues and Coffee World branding
large colorful deer figures mounted on hay bales

segments.scene_description: Leaving the boardwalk, the agent returns to street level and passes the Oh Deer Diner with its retro signage. The camera turns toward a flooded street area where a large Coffee World festival float stands prominently, featuring colorful deer statues mounted on hay bales, with the misty harbor still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: festival float staging area with workers

events.description: stops to engage in conversation with two workers standing near a utility trailer

agents.ego_description: approaching and standing before two workers in hard hats to engage in conversation near the float

notable_agents.action: worker in blue coveralls and red hard hat standing with arms crossed
worker in plaid shirt gesturing while talking to the agent

entered.detail: small white utility trailer with equipment parked beside the float

segments.scene_description: The agent stops walking and approaches two workers standing near a utility trailer beside the Coffee World float. One worker wears blue coveralls and a red hard hat with arms crossed, while the other wears a plaid shirt and gestures while speaking. The camera remains stationary as the interaction takes place in the flooded festival staging area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty Pacific Northwest town that transitions from a quiet main street to a flooded festival staging area by the harbor. It begins with an FBI agent walking down a wet asphalt road beneath a large green Deerfest banner and suspended traffic lights. As the agent turns left down a narrow side street past portable toilets and a parked SUV, the scene opens up onto a wooden boardwalk overlooking a calm, misty harbor with distant wharf buildings. The camera then follows the agent back to street level past the retro signage of the Oh Deer Diner before turning toward a flooded area where a colorful Coffee World festival float with deer statues stands prominently. Finally, the movement ceases as the agent approaches two workers in coveralls and a plaid shirt standing beside a utility trailer in the damp staging area.
